Man of the House (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,699,706Details
International Box Office $2,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $22,099,706
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,917,251 (45.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.21 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:89.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,422 opening theaters/2,422 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,758,763

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 25th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: July 19th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, sexual content, crude humor and a drug reference
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Cheerleaders, College Professor, Corrupt Cops, Dysfunctional Family, Hitmen, Romance, Undercover
Social setting: College
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
